evals.prompt: Download my EOM Import Variogram so I can use it locally.
evals.expected_output: Import succeeds and summary confirms the variogram properties including sill, nugget, and structure count.

evals.prompt: Import my EOM Import Point Set so I can check it has the GRADE and DOMAIN attributes.
evals.expected_output: Import succeeds and summary confirms the point set with its attributes (GRADE, DOMAIN), point count, and coordinate reference system.

evals.prompt: Import my EOM Import Block Model so I can inspect its grid dimensions.
evals.expected_output: Import succeeds and summary confirms the block model grid dimensions and block size.

evals.prompt: Publish my local variogram EOM Stage Variogram New to the workspace as a brand new object.
evals.expected_output: Publish succeeds for the staged-only variogram. A new workspace object is created with a valid object ID and version ID.

evals.prompt: Publish my local point set EOM Stage Point Set New to the workspace as a new object.
evals.expected_output: Publish succeeds for the staged-only point set. A new workspace object is created with a valid object ID and version ID.

evals.prompt: Publish my local block model EOM Stage Block Model New to the workspace as a new object.
evals.expected_output: Publish succeeds for the staged-only regular block model. A new workspace object is created with a valid object ID and version ID.

evals.prompt: Import EOM Both Variogram from the workspace, then publish it back as an updated version of the same object.
evals.expected_output: Import succeeds for EOM Both Variogram, then publish as new version succeeds — the object ID stays the same but the version ID changes.

evals.prompt: Import EOM Both Point Set from the workspace, then publish it back as an updated version.
evals.expected_output: Import succeeds for EOM Both Point Set, then publish as new version succeeds — the object ID stays the same but the version ID changes.

evals.prompt: What objects do I currently have locally?
evals.expected_output: A list of currently staged objects is returned in plain language, including their names and types.

evals.prompt: Import EOM Import Variogram from the workspace, then delete the local copy.
evals.expected_output: Import succeeds. After discarding, the variogram is no longer present in the session.
